calendar.description: House Economic Development and Workforce Services Hearing

general_provisions: This bill addresses state legal holidays and holy days.
hilighted_provisions: This bill:<hr><ltbullet>makes Good Friday a legal holiday in Utah;<hr><ltbullet>requires a school district, a charter school, and an institution of higher education to prioritize, to the extent possible, scheduling school breaks to coincide with state holy days;<hr><ltbullet>requires a government entity to place a high priority on approving an employee's request to take personal leave on a state holy day; and<hr><ltbullet>makes technical changes.
